title: Python not found in n8n Exec Command Node
symptom: When executing a Python script in the Exec Command Node, n8n returns an error stating 'python3: not found'. This prevents the script from running successfully.
not_this_if: Python is installed in the n8n container
Using a different command that does not require Python
root_cause: The n8n container image does not include Python by default. As a result, any attempt to execute a Python script will fail with a 'not found' error unless Python is installed in the container.
fix_steps: Access the n8n container using Docker.
Run the command: docker exec -u root -it <container_name> sh -c 'apk add --no-cache python3 py3-pip' to install Python.
If needed, set up a Python virtual environment and install any required packages.
agent_instruction: Install Python in the n8n container using the provided Docker commands.
